stage1.why_it_matters_short: Helps familiar voices, songs and pauses feel meaningful.
stage1.why_it_matters_long: Your baby may pause when they hear you, turn towards a sound, or answer with a tiny coo. Gentle songs, familiar voices and simple rhythm help them connect listening with comfort, attention and early conversation. Short, repeated moments are enough at this age.

stage2.mapping_rationale: Mapped from current age-band evidence into the things that can help lane.

top_picks.product_name: Baby Touch: Faces: a black-and white-book
top_picks.best_for: Best for visual stimulation and early development
top_picks.title: High-Contrast Faces Book
top_picks.description: A black-and-white board book with large, friendly faces designed to stimulate vision from birth and aid in early visual development.
top_picks.why_pip_picked_this: This book directly addresses the developmental needs of 1-3 month olds by providing high-contrast images of faces, which are known to be highly engaging for newborns and support visual development. The sturdy board book format is durable for early handling.
top_picks.founder_lens: Ensure the 21,000+ reviews are indeed for this specific book and not a general Bookshop.org rating. Verify the actual number of reviews for the book on other retailers if possible.

evidence.claim: Board book £6.64 £6.99 Available. Despatches immediately. 4.9/5.0 21,000+ Reviews
Designed to develop babies' eyesight, this book of large, friendly faces will stimulate vision from birth.

top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: A sturdy Ladybird board book of large black and white faces, sized for newborn focus and early shared looking on the sofa or changing mat.
top_picks.ember_verdict: Vision is still learning distance in the first months, so big simple faces beat busy colour spreads. A board book you can hold close turns a feed break into a short look and chat. Leave it for awake cuddles, not the cot.

top_picks.product_name: Usborne Baby’s Very First Black & White Books – 4 Board Book Set (Animals, Hello!, Outdoors, Bedtime)
top_picks.best_for: Best value multi-book set for visual development
top_picks.title: Usborne Black & White Set
top_picks.description: A set of four high-contrast board books featuring animals, greetings, outdoors, and bedtime themes, perfect for stimulating newborn vision.
top_picks.why_pip_picked_this: This set offers a variety of high-contrast themes (animals, greetings, outdoors, bedtime) in a robust board book format, catering to the visual development needs of 1-3 month olds. The multiple books provide extended engagement and value.
top_picks.founder_lens: Need to find rating and review count for this specific set. The current listing does not provide this information. Check other retailers or Usborne's official site.

evidence.claim: Price: £9.89 Stock: In stock. This robust board book will fascinate babies, and introduce them to all kinds of animals. Every page is designed to stimulate developing minds, with striking high-contrast illustrations and inviting holes to peep-through.

top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: A Usborne set of four high-contrast board books covering animals, hellos, outdoors and bedtime scenes, all in bold black and white for early looking.
top_picks.ember_verdict: One book gets sticky milk on it fast. A small set means you can rotate themes without buying five singles at once. High-contrast still matches what young eyes notice first, and the sturdy boards survive the grab that comes next.

top_picks.title: Interactive Peekaboo Bear
top_picks.description: An interactive board book with easy-to-use sliders and a surprise mirror ending, featuring friendly faces and forest animals.
top_picks.why_pip_picked_this: The interactive sliders and mirror ending provide engaging peekaboo play, which is excellent for early interaction and developing object permanence. The focus on faces and animals aligns with early visual and cognitive development.
top_picks.founder_lens: The Amazon listing shows 'Board book from £2.76 Other Used and New from £2.76'. Need to confirm the new price and availability from a reliable source if possible. The 4.8 rating with 879 reviews is strong.

evidence.claim: Board book from £2.76. 4.8 out of 5 stars (879 reviews). With 10 easy-to-use sliders to push, pull or turn in every book and a surprise mirror ending, this bestselling series is perfect for babies and toddlers!

top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: An interactive Nosy Crow board book with easy sliders, friendly faces and forest animals, ending on a surprise mirror page for shared peekaboo.
top_picks.ember_verdict: By two to three months, a little reveal game starts to click. Sliders you operate for them keep the play gentle while faces stay the draw. The mirror ending adds one more face without needing a separate toy on the sofa.

top_picks.title: Simple Faces Book
top_picks.description: A high-contrast board book featuring various faces and expressions, designed to be easy for babies to focus on and stimulate developing sight.
top_picks.why_pip_picked_this: This book focuses specifically on faces with high contrast, which is ideal for newborn visual development and social skill building. The simple design aids focus for very young infants.
top_picks.founder_lens: Unable to find current price, availability, rating, and review count from UK retailers. The Priddy Books website lists an age range of 0-6 months and provides links to Amazon UK, Waterstones, Bookshop.org, and WHSmith, but these links either failed or showed out of stock/no results. The price of £4.99 is an estimate based on similar books.

evidence.claim: Age Range: 0-6 months. Roger Priddy’s Hello Baby: Faces is a high-contrast board book with lots of different faces for little eyes to discover!

top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: A high-contrast Roger Priddy board book of clear faces and expressions, kept simple so very young babies can hold a look without visual clutter.
top_picks.ember_verdict: Busy pages lose them when focus is still short. Clear faces with strong contrast give you something to point at and name in a quiet voice. Useful when you want one book that does the face job cleanly, without gadgets or flaps in the way.

top_picks.title: Amazing Black & White
top_picks.description: An interactive board book with cut-out pages featuring high-contrast patterns, dots, and stripes to engage babies and introduce them to new sounds.
top_picks.why_pip_picked_this: The cut-out pages and high-contrast patterns are excellent for visual stimulation and interaction, which is crucial for early development. The simple rhyme also encourages auditory engagement.
top_picks.founder_lens: Need to find current price, availability, rating, and review count from UK retailers. The price of £5.99 is an estimate based on similar books. The BookTrust link is informational.

evidence.claim: Turn the cut-out pages of this excellent black-and-white baby book and discover spotty frogs, stripy bees and even a sleepy teddy bear on pages filled with patterns, dots and stripes. A perfect first book with an easy rhyme that means baby can also get used to the sound of your voice.

top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: An interactive Emma Dodd board book with cut out pages of black and white patterns, dots and stripes, plus a simple rhyme for shared looking and listening.
top_picks.ember_verdict: Patterns help as much as faces while sight is sharpening. Cut out pages let little fingers poke through while you hold the book steady. The rhyme keeps your voice in the game without turning shared looking into homework on the sofa.

longlist.product_name: Baby Touch: Faces: a black-and white-book

longlist.reason: Colorful lift-the-flap book introducing animals and their sounds/actions, promoting interaction.
Engaging story with animal characters, good for sound imitation and rhythm.

Another book specifically for tummy time, promoting engagement during this important developmental activity.

skips.reason: Age range 0-7 years, while suitable for older babies, it's less specifically targeted for the 1-3 month age band compared to other options. More complex narrative.

While a classic, the cloth book format is less ideal for the 'listen and coo' cluster compared to board books with clear visuals. Also, the narrative might be too complex for 1-3 months.

guidance_notes: For 'Hello Baby: Faces' and 'Amazing Baby: Black and White', further research is needed to find reliable UK retailer links with current pricing, availability, and specific customer ratings/review counts to strengthen their top pick status. Google Shopping fallback URLs were used due to difficulty in finding direct, verified retailer pages with all required data.
Consider adding a note about the importance of reading aloud and interacting with babies during book time, regardless of the book's complexity, to reinforce the 'listen and coo' cluster theme.

The age ranges provided by some sources (e.g., BookTrust) are quite broad (0-4 years). While these books may be suitable for the broader range, ensure the content and interactivity are truly appropriate and engaging for the specific 1-3 month age band.
